title: Crude Distillation Unit - Normal Startup Procedure
steps: Verify all isolation valves are in correct position per P&ID
Commission cooling water to E-201 and confirm flow
Start P-101B on minimum flow recycle
Gradually increase crude charge to 60% design rate
Monitor V-301 bottom temperature - target 340°C before commencing product draws

title: Naphtha Hydrotreater - Compressor Start Procedure
steps: Confirm dry gas seal supply pressure > 6 bar g
Open antisurge valve FV-501 fully before start
Engage coupling and bring to minimum speed
Monitor suction/discharge pressures and vibration
Gradually close antisurge valve once stable operating point achieved

title: Tank Farm - Naphtha Tank Drain Operation
steps: Obtain PTW and gas-test bund area
Confirm drain pit pump is operational
Open vent valve before drain valve
Crack-open manual drain valve and confirm flow to drain pit
Monitor for spillage; close valve immediately if bund level rises

title: Flare System - Pilot Reignition Procedure
steps: Confirm purge gas flow to flare header > 5 Nm3/hr
Isolate electrical supply to ignition transformer - check
Inspect pilot tip for blockage or mechanical damage
Restore ignition supply and activate electronic ignitor
Confirm pilot flame via thermocouple reading > 500°C

title: PSV Bypass and Online Maintenance Procedure
steps: Obtain SIL bypass permit and approval from Plant Manager
Install calibrated bypass valve in parallel to PSV
Isolate PSV inlet block valve - verify zero energy state
Remove PSV and transport to workshop for bench testing
Reinstall certified PSV and restore line-up; remove bypass
